name: Apricot Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
APRICOT FILLING: Cook the dried apricots in cold water until almost tender, stirring occasionally. Add sugar and lemon juice. Add the cinnamon, continue cooking until thickened and tender. Remove from heat and add butter. Cool.
COOKIES: Cream together the cream cheese and margarine until smooth. Gradually add flour to form a smooth dough. Use a wooden spoon for creaming; do not use a mixer. Chill the dough for 10-15 minutes. Roll out on a floured surface to a thin layer, cut into circles, and place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Place a small amount of apricot filling on half the circles, about 1/4 inch from the edge. Fold the circles over and press the edges together with a fork. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes until very pale golden brown. Cool completely before icing with powdered sugar icing. These are delightful with hot tea.
Margaret Garland DFYX18A Source: Prize Winning Recipes from the State Fair of Texas, 1976.
